description: These id mid-top chukka shoes add a fresh spin on a classic style with their faux greased midsole. The humble sneaker has reached a new high with this casual shoe; innovative design details include contrasting textures and unique colour map. Wear this with a crisp shirt, tonal half zippered sweater, and a jacket or blazer to achieve the perfect layered look. Pair this with your favourite jeans or chinos. Comes with a spare set of laces. Upper Mid top suede upper with fabric and denim overlays Branding printed on the upper in the mid-foot region Central lace ups Padded tongue and collar Mesh lining Contrast stitch detailing Midsole Textured PU midsole Outsole Rubber outsole with multidirectional lugs and grooves Shoe care Wipe with a dry cloth to remove dust
